# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

image: python:3.9-slim

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

install:
  stage: test
  stage: install
  script:
    - pip install --no-deps --no-cache-dir -U .
    - pip install --no-deps --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt --upgrade

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - python -m unittest discover -s . -p 'test_*.py'

build:
  stage: build
  stage: install
  script:
    - pip install --no-deps --no-cache-dir -U .
    - pip install --no-deps --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt --upgrade

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  environment:
    name: production
  script:
    - python -m app.run --server-name your-server-name
